name: slack_add_reaction
description: Add an emoji reaction to a message

channel.description: Channel ID containing the message (e.g., C1234567890)

timestamp.description: EXACT timestamp of the message to react to. Use the 'ts' field from slack_read_messages response (e.g., '1755275438.285079'). DO NOT generate or modify timestamps.

name.description: Valid Slack emoji name (without colons). Common valid names: "white_check_mark", "thumbsup", "thumbsdown", "heart", "eyes", "fire", "100". DO NOT use custom emojis or invalid names.

examples.name: Add thumbs up reaction to a message
Add check mark reaction using exact timestamp from slack_read_messages
